data.description: BUILDPLAN M3 / WS-11 (BUILDPLAN id MA-12). makeProposeFixHandler factory parameterizing prompt file and model; the three propose* handlers become instances; parity tests (existing plus new) prove identical behavior per kind. AC: AC-24. Depends: MA-08, MA-10. Serialize: handlers/*. Size M.
data.title: Deduplicate propose handlers via factory

data.body:
<review>
Verdict: PASS

Scope reviewed: ec8ae0c vs origin/claude/ma-10-mcp-schemas@37c7fcd — 7 files, +427/-126, all under falcon-detective (serialization lane handlers/* respected; falcon-agent untouched, G-1 intact).

Checks performed:
1. Behavior parity, line-by-line old handle vs factory strategies (src/handlers/proposeFix.ts:71-101): excerpt selection (issue-file match for bug/lint at :73-75; endsWith("prompt.rs") for poison at :86-88), prompt vars incl. String(line ?? 0) and JSON.stringify(report, null, 2), Gemini construction order, models (bug=PRO, lint=FLASH, poison=PRO), outputValidator UnifiedDiff — all byte-identical to the pre-factory bodies.
2. Engine resolvability: Barnum createHandler captures the calling file as the worker's import module (node_modules/@barnum/barnum/dist/handler.js getCallerFilePath), so instances are declared+exported in proposeFix.ts and legacy files are re-export shims. Proven end-to-end by tests/lib/invokeHandler.test.ts (real runPipeline, separate worker) plus tests/handlers/proposeFix.test.ts module/func pins.
3. Public-surface freeze for MA-13: export names, import paths, handler ids, input/output types unchanged. Only additive exports (makeProposeFixHandler, IssueFixInput, PoisonFixInput).
4. Schema equivalence: bug/lint inline z.object({file,content}) replaced by structurally identical Excerpt — same JSON Schema, same validation behavior; pinned by bug/lint validator-parity tests.
5. AC-24 parity tests: existing proposeBugFix cassette test + proposePoisonFix validation tests pass UNMODIFIED; new cassette round-trips pin lint (flash+lint prompt+excerpt selection+previousFailure threading, tests/handlers/proposeLintFix.test.ts) and poison (pro+poison prompt+prompt.rs excerpt+report vars, tests/handlers/proposePoisonFix.test.ts:80-135). Cassette key = sha256(model\nschema\nprompt) so a hit proves model+prompt-byte parity; recorded e2e cassettes remain valid.
6. Gates: npm test 97/97; tsc --noEmit clean; npm run build clean; biome clean (1 organizeImports finding fixed pre-commit); debt-gates.sh 8/8 PASS (incl. no-handler-any AC-12, barnum-private-surface AC-13); check-planted-defects.sh OK.

Findings:
- [Nit] tests/handlers/proposeFix.test.ts:52-55 inputValidatorOf reaches __definition — mirrors the existing, documented test pattern; AC-13 gate scopes src/ only. No action.
- [Nit] HANDLER_IDS table (proposeFix.ts:104-108) could be derived from kind, but the explicit table pins the worker-visible export names more legibly. No action.

No Critical/Major findings.
</review>

PR opened: https://github.com/mrojas54/maltese-agent/pull/42 (head ec8ae0c, base main, stacked on #40 / origin/claude/ma-10-mcp-schemas@37c7fcd — merge #40 first). Gates: npm test 97/97, tsc clean, build clean, biome clean, debt-gates 8/8 PASS, planted-defects OK.
Merged via operator-authorized merge train (PR #42, merge commit 2eedbc6, CI green verified pre-merge).
